data.name: Cambion
data.detailed_description:
You get to select which powers the hero gets, each option leading him to a different path.

Characters roles differ based on the path you've chosen and the decisions you make.

The relationships you develop ultimately decide how successful your journey will be.
data.about_the_game:
You get to select which powers the hero gets, each option leading him to a different path.

Characters roles differ based on the path you've chosen and the decisions you make.

The relationships you develop ultimately decide how successful your journey will be.
data.short_description: Cambion is an adult visual novel about a young man who discovers he's a half-demon. He is tasked with the mission to save the city from the forces of darkness. Embark on this adventure and you will gain power and influence and win the hearts of the sexiest women in the city.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 5220 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5180 MB 可用空間
